differential_diagnoses: Leptomeningeal recurrence of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL)
next_steps: Send cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) for arbovirus panel (specifically Powassan virus IgM and PCR)
Send CSF for comprehensive infectious disease PCR panel (including JC virus, VZV, HSV, and Listeria)
Send CSF for paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis antibody panels (including anti-DNER, anti-Yo)
Request repeat CSF cytology and flow cytometry, potentially with immunohistochemistry (e.g., CD20, CD3, EBV-encoded small RNA/EBER)
Consider repeat brain MRI with thin-section imaging focused on the cerebellum and brainstem to evaluate for progression or new enhancement
Continue supportive care and reassess immunosuppressive regimen
